  sl  local_address rem_address   st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
   0: 0100007F:207D 00000000:0000 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000 1000 0 1
   1: 00000000:0000 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000 1000 0 2
   2: 0100007F:FFFF 00000000:0000 06 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000 1000 0 3
